titel: Statement from EU Commissioner Lahbib at Budapest Pride, delivered directly to the audience:
html:
Statement from the European Commission, Budapest, June 27, 2026.

Last year, we were all here together in this city when the Pride parade was banned and when people risked prosecution simply for walking on the streets. Despite that, you marched, two hundred...
tldr: The EU Commissioner, Lahbib, spoke at a Pride parade in Budapest to demonstrate her support for the rights of LGBTQ+ individuals. She emphasized the importance of freedom, especially after the parade had been banned the previous year.
lattlast:
On June 27, 2026, EU Commissioner Lahbib gave a speech in Budapest. She addressed the people participating in the Pride parade directly to express her support for their rights.

She reminded the audience that the parade had been banned the previous year. At that time, people risked being punished by law simply for walking on the streets and expressing their identity.

Despite the difficulties and dangers last year, people chose to march anyway. The Commissioner wanted to highlight their courage and the importance of being free to express themselves in public spaces.
